sections.title: My Tasks
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND assignee = currentUser() AND status != Done

powers.label: Explain
powers.prompt: Explain {key} "{summary}" — what's the scope and context?

powers.label: Analyze
powers.prompt: Analyze {key} "{summary}". Identify key information and action items.

powers.label: Summarize
powers.prompt: Summarize recent activity in {prefix} project over the last 2 days.
